---
title: "[Idea] "
labels: discussion
---

Use this for open-ended ideas, architecture questions, or "has anyone tried
X" conversations that aren't yet a concrete bug report or feature request.
If your idea firms up into something actionable, it can graduate into an
issue using the feature request template.

## What's on your mind?

## Relevant docs already covering this area (if any)

Check `docs/architecture.md`, `docs/plugin-api.md`, `docs/theming.md`,
`docs/events.md`, `docs/component-api.md` first — many "has anyone thought
about..." questions already have a documented answer or a stated reason
something works the way it does.

## Anything else?
